title: conyza suffruticosa
intro: Conyza suffruticosa, also known as small fleabane or annual fleabane, is a perennial herb native to South America that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Conyza suffruticosa include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Conyza suffruticosa can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine in various forms, including ointments and creams.
